title: Sniff Trail - Unique Rideable Sniffer
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb5bc2def3f779492ddaa7377595ff6ab9677d3d.png)

# **Disclaimer**
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.
Also, I don't have the time, so I can't provide detailed support.

# **About**
Automatic movement using a sniffer!

# How to Use

## 1.Craft Items
![Guiding Torchflower Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e446ae82ec9ee94a4c77c86f1471d2ec1aeca77b.png)
![Sniff Station Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce187ca817ba020e79276896e880b6465f50134e.png)

First, Craft "Guiding Torchflower" and "Sniff Station".

## 2.Call the Sniffer
![Call the Sniffer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f4c31d91ff08e622d76acada329a62bc1f808c8.png)

Right-clicking on the Sniff Station will call nearby sniffers and grant them the Trailing effect.

## 3.Ride!
![Trail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37faf0c6ff21fcdd8b537e309f7189c63014413.png)

You can ride the Sniffer when in Trailing!
You'll be heading in the direction of the Guiding Torchflower, so make sure to lay out a path.
